summary:
Training completed in 1.8 hours (62 epochs).
        Best performance achieved at epoch 56.

        Key Metrics:
        - mAP@50: 0.9642 (mean average precision at 50% IoU)
        - mAP@50-95: 0.8148 (mAP across all IoU thresholds)
        - Precision: 0.9461 (accuracy of positive predictions)
        - Recall: 0.9365 (completeness of detections)

        Final Loss: 0.4271
strengths: ✅ Excellent precision: mAP@50-95 = 0.8148 indicates strong overall detection accuracy
✅ High recall: 0.9365 - model captures most objects in images
✅ High precision: 0.9461 - low false positive rate
recommendations: ✨ Model shows good fit! Monitor validation metrics in future runs.
